failures.issue: Op 0 is a hard keep_only directive for 'segments containing spoken questions.' The entire video (0.0s–80.8s) was retained at a 0.1% removal ratio. Reviewing the kept transcript, the only identifiable spoken question is 'Why are balloons so expensive?' (the balloon joke setup near the end). All other content — the opening provocation, the Facebook/internet commentary, the attention span declaration, the TED talk length bit — contains no spoken questions and should have been removed. The keep_only rule was effectively not applied.
